prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约4219名、4040名、2804名、2157名、7914名。2021–2024年整体呈明显上升趋势（位次数字减小），但2025年因专 业组结构调整（新增预防医学、临床医学类等专业组（901）拉低整体位次），最低位次大幅后移至7914名，较2024年下降约5757名。2025年主流专业组（101）位次约2061名，显 示学校整体录取实力仍处高位；该校在河南省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年149人、2022年141人、2023年100人、2024年74人、2025年158人；2026年计划208人，较2025年增加50人（扩招约31.6%）。扩招幅度较大，对竞争有缓解作用，但考生规模同步大幅增长。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东南大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建 设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第15名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第13–17名区间，学校层次极高，综合实力强劲；2026年声誉文件中未出现东南大学相 关事件；2025年声誉周期无东南大学记录；2023年曾因师德师风事件获偏负面评价，但影响有限；抖音热度排名第31位（较热），综合热度约137万，短视频曝光中等偏上，报考 关注度稳定。未见明显投档断档或暴跌记录；东南大学拥有A+学科5个（建筑学、土木工程、交通运输工程、生物医学工程、电子科学与技术），A类学科18个（ 含A-及以上），涵盖建筑、土木、交通、电子、信息、计算机、控制、机械、电气等核心工科领域，学科实力全国顶尖，对考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等东南大学优势专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中均为高热推荐/推荐，社会报考热度持续走高；土木建筑类呈分化观望。河南省2026年高 考报名总人数约120万，较2025年总考生约90.7万大幅增加约32%；物理类考生从2025年约55.5万增至估算约73.4万，竞争显著加剧。；东南大学位于江苏省南京市（长三角核心城市），对河南省考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南省招生规模较大（2026年物理类208人），属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基数效应、2026年扩招50人（+31.6%）的缓解作用、河南省物理类考生规模大幅增加（+32%）带来的竞争加剧、以及学校顶尖学科实力和稳定 声誉，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年（7914名）继续后移，但扩招部分抵消考生增量冲击。预测最低位次约9467名，波动区间8967–9967名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 4219, 4040, 2804, 2157, and 7914 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a clear upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), but in 2025, due to adjustments in the major group structure (addition of preventive medicine, clinical medicine, and other major groups (901) lowering the overall ranking), the minimum ranking significantly dropped to 7914, a decrease of about 5757 places compared to 2024. In 2025, the mainstream major group (101) had a ranking of about 2061, indicating that the overall admission strength of the university remains high. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Henan Province: 149 in 2021, 141 in 2022, 100 in 2023, 74 in 2024, 158 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 208, an increase of 50 compared to 2025 (an expansion of about 31.6%). The expansion is relatively large, which helps alleviate competition, but the number of examinees has also increased significantly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 15th (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 13th–17th range in recent years. The university level is extremely high, with strong comprehensive strength. In the 2026 reputation documents, no related events about Southeast University appeared; in the 2025 reputation cycle, there were no records of Southeast University; in 2023, there was a negative evaluation due to a teacher ethics incident, but the impact was limited. Douyin popularity ranking is 31st (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.37 million, medium to high short video exposure, and stable application attention. No obvious filing gaps or sharp drops were recorded. Southeast University has 5 A+ disciplines (Architecture, Civil Engineering, Transportation Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology), and 18 A-level disciplines (including A- and above), covering core engineering fields such as architecture, civil engineering, transportation, electronics, information, computer science, control, machinery, and electrical engineering. The discipline strength is top in the country, strongly attracting examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and its automation, and other advantageous majors of Southeast University are all high-heat recommended/recommended in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with social application popularity continuing to rise; civil engineering and architecture show differentiation and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Henan Province is about 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to the total examinees of about 907,000 in 2025; physics category examinees increased from about 555,000 in 2025 to an estimated 734,000, significantly intensifying competition. Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province (core city of the Yangtze River Delta), which has strong regional appeal to Henan examinees; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Henan Province (208 in physics category in 2026), making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant ranking drop in 2025, the mitigating effect of the 2026 expansion of 50 students (+31.6%), the intensified competition due to the significant increase in physics category examinees in Henan Province (+32%), and the university's top discipline strength and stable reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to drop compared to 2025 (7914), but the expansion partially offsets the impact of the increase in examinees. The predicted minimum ranking is about 9467, with a fluctuation range of 8967–9967.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 9467, range 8967–9967. If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<8967), focus on impacting Tier 1 popular majors such as Wu Jianxiong Class, Computer Science, and Electronic Information; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>9967), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, striving to enter the Southeast University platform and then adjust through internal major distribution or transfer.

The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Henan Province: 5 students each year from 2021 to 2025 (increased to 15 in 2024, but dropped back to 5 in 2025); the 2026 plan is 6 students, an increase of 1 student (+20%) compared to 2025. The enrollment scale is extremely small, and minor plan adjustments have limited impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; it ranked 15th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science University Rankings. No obvious enrollment gaps or discontinuities were observed. Southeast University's Law is an A- discipline, which has some connection to its liberal arts enrollment majors (Political Science and Administration, English).
